---
name: Good first issue
about: Track a contributor-friendly improvement
title: "[Good First Issue] "
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the small improvement clearly.

## Suggested starting point

Point to the file, command, or behavior that a contributor should inspect first.

## Definition of done

- [ ] Behavior or docs are updated
- [ ] Relevant tests are added or updated when needed
- [ ] The change is easy to review
